## Standard / reference

<!--
For a new cryptographic primitive or mode, cite the spec (GB/T, GM/T, NIST
SP, RFC) and a source for known-answer test vectors. New algorithms need a
source-cited reference vector before merge (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
-->

## Scope notes

<!--
This is a single-maintainer project that ships behind scope docs per
release cycle (see docs/). Large additions (new modes, streaming, FFI)
typically land in their own version. Check the roadmap in README.md.
-->
